documentId.description: The document which the verification is for new reminders and/or update.

assignee.description: The obfuscated id of the person this verification is assigned to.

remindInDays.description: Reminder for the next verifications in terms of days. For deletion, this will be omitted.

reason.description: An optional free-text reason for the reminder. This is particularly useful when a reminder is used to ask for verification from another user (for example, "Duplicate", "Incomplete", "Incorrect").
